Victor Frankenstein (2015)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $5,775,076Details
International Box Office $25,349,291
Worldwide Box Office $31,124,367
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,623,188
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $787,854
Total $2,411,042
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Radical scientist Victor Frankenstein and his equally brilliant protégé Igor Strausman share a noble vision of aiding humanity through their groundbreaking research into immortality. But Victor’s experiments go too far, and his obsession has horrifying consequences. Only Igor can bring his friend back from the brink of madness and save him from his monstrous creation.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$2,469,341 (42.8% of total gross)
Legs:2.34 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:18.6% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$40,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,797 opening theaters/2,797 max. theaters, 2.2 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $8,193,342

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 25th, 2015 (Wide) by 20th Century Fox
International Releases: November 25th, 2015 (Wide) (Cambodia)
November 25th, 2015 (Wide) (France)
November 25th, 2015 (Wide) (Indonesia)
November 26th, 2015 (Wide) (Bolivia)
November 26th, 2015 (Wide) (Central America)
Video Release: February 23rd, 2016 by Fox Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for macabre images, violence and a sequence of destruction.
(Rating bulletin 2383, 7/23/2015)
Running Time: 110 minutes
Plot point: Frankenstien's Monster, Inventor, Mad Scientist
Subgenre: Gothic Horror
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: 20th Century Fox, Davis Entertainment
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
